topic: A person unboxing the latest iPhone 16 Pro in Desert Titanium on a wooden table, front view.

parsed_generation.script:
Shot 1 [00:00-00:02]: front view of hands gripping the Desert Titanium iPhone 16 Pro box on a wooden table
Shot 2 [00:02-00:05]: close-up of hands lifting the lid to reveal the Desert Titanium iPhone 16 Pro inside the box
Shot 3 [00:05-00:08]: side-angle of hands holding the opened box to present the Desert Titanium iPhone 16 Pro inside
parsed_generation.narration: An eight-second unboxing sequence unfolds from a front view to a close-up reveal and a side-angle lift, with the Desert Titanium iPhone 16 Pro displayed on the wooden surface. The focus remains on hands and box throughout the three shots, delivering a tight, cinematic reveal.

feedback:
The concept adheres to an unboxing motif and front-view focus, but it lacks the more detailed, multi-shot progression of the gold standard (top-down lid slide, phone-out reveal, and accessory/film details). Timestamps are uneven and do not follow the 2-second increments seen in the gold standard, and the visuals could benefit from explicit angles (top-down, macro) and additional cinematic cues. To improve, add a four-shot sequence with 2-second segments, include lid removal, phone face-down reveal with lenses, accessories, and a protective film macro shot, and weave in SFX cues for a richer cinematic feel.
Failed checks: example_alignment
strengths: Consistent focus on the Desert Titanium item and wooden surface
fixes: Incorporate top-down opening and lid-slide action to mirror the gold standard
Add a fourth shot showing the phone outside the box (and accessories) with a 2-second timestamp, e.g., [00:06-00:08], and consider a macro peel shot
